customers_say: Customers find this smart lock to be a feature-rich device with strong security and a beautiful appearance. They appreciate its functionality, with one customer noting flawless real-time alerts, and its ease of use with multiple unlock options. Customers consider it good value for money and praise its installation process, with one mentioning seamless integration through the app.

reviews.author: Manish
reviews.title: Atomsberg Lock Review
reviews.body: The lock was fitted perfectly and installation was done in super smooth manner The service guy Uday was very corporative

reviews.author: Ramesh Bisht
reviews.title: Feedback
reviews.body: Awesome product, nice and smooth installation by suraj.

reviews.author: Chirag
reviews.title: Installation Review
reviews.body: Looks good and feeling safe, Mr. Shravan installed lock perfectly. Will update usage review later days.

reviews.author: Ablash
reviews.title: Great lock and experience
reviews.body: Tinku Sharma was very polite and did a wonderful job with the installation. He constantly followed up after the delivery and provided a smooth experience.
